allow: Bash(git commit -m 'docs: add brand brief, SOW, env templates *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(ops\): install Shopify Dev MCP, create theme envs, add AI workflow doc *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(design\): generate brand system directly from brief *)
Bash(git tag -a v0.0-day1 -m 'Day 1 complete — Foundation + Brand + MCP + Theme Environments *)
Bash(git commit -m 'docs: log Google Doc artifact in BUILD-LOG *)
